title: Cuneiform Tablet #0873: Middle Babylonian Marriage Contract
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Middle Babylonian period — a marriage contract document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Middle Babylonian period — a marriage contract document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Middle Babylonian period. Marriage Contract document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records marriage contract matters typical of Middle Babylonian period administrative or literary practice.
